results.title: North Wales Road Runners Club members in top form at Chester half-marathon
results.description: There were more than 700 elite, club, and mixed ability athletes at the Essa Chester half marathon on May 17, with North Wales Road Runners Club (NWRRC) having five entries.

results.title: Svechnikov scores in OT as Hurricanes beat Canadiens 3-2 in Game 3 of NHL East final
results.description: MONTREAL -- Andrei Svechnikov scored at 14:06 of overtime as the Carolina Hurricanes defeated the Montreal Canadiens 3-2 on Monday night to take a 2-1 lead in the NHL Eastern Conference final.

results.description: The news of Brad Scott’s sacking reached “a random guy” at the local cafe before Essendon players, Zach Merrett has revealed.
